commands.review_summary:
The PR adds key-free web_search ready copy to wizard i18n, changes finalizeSetupWizard to branch on requiresCredential === false, and adds a regression test for a selected keyless provider.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +43. Total +58 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main reaches the missing-key warning for a selected provider with no credential because the branch does not check requiresCredential. I did not execute the wizard in this read-only review, so this is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
